name: Bayou Catfish Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the catfish fillets with hot sauce, salt, and pepper. Allow to sit for at least 1 hour.
2. Cut the fish into bite-sized pieces.
3. Dip each piece of fish in beaten eggs.
4. Roll the fish pieces in cornmeal until fully coated.
5. Heat cooking oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to at least 350°F (175°C).
6. Fry the fish balls quickly in batches for 2-3 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
7. Remove from the oil using tongs and drain on paper towels.
8. Serve hot.
NOTE: Serve immediately after frying to ensure maximum freshness and texture.
